name: Void Seer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>煉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>徒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>と</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Infernoid" monster you control; that target is unaffected by the opponent's card effects this turn. If an "Infernoid" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by a card effect, you can banish this card from your Graveyard instead of destroying 1 of those monsters.
eff: Target 1 "Infernoid" monster you control; that target is unaffected by the opponent's card effects this turn. If an "Infernoid" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by a card effect, you can banish this card from your Graveyard instead of destroying 1 of those monsters.

mst: Unaffected by the opponent's card effects
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
